sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84499" key="polisso/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολισσόος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σῴζω</etym>) <sense id="n84499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guarding a city</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cities,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
